name: Diamond Caves
short_description: Diamond Caves is a classic arcade puzzle games related to the good old 8bit and 16bit days. Get out of a cave by collect all the Emeralds and Diamonds and beware of traps and monsters... now with level editor!
detailed_description:
The main goal in Diamond Caves is to get out of a cave by collecting enough Emeralds and Diamonds for the exit to open. This can be quite tricky because you are not alone in the cave, there are a few different enemies as well as special items such as doors, keys, acid pools, teleporters, bombs & dynamite and much more...

The game features:

  • classic 16bit graphics and sound
  • full mouse/keyboard or controller support
  • single player and split-screen co-op
  • Several groups of Levels of various difficulty: 200 single player levels and 100 teamwork levels
  • each Level with its own Highscore-Leaderboard
  • unlock bonus Levels and Steam achievements
  • Level Editor included
  • Steam Workshop support: download user generated levels
